fixes.description: Flip T177 expected_direction from decreased to increased
fixes.reason: Raw evidence states "osvil2 ostb1 similar to ostb1". ostb1 single-KO (T022) is expected=increased, so the double should also be increased.
fixes.biological_justification: osvil2 is epistatic to ostb1 per Lee 2019 Mol Cells. Since the loss-of-function phenotype of ostb1 de-represses tiller outgrowth (canonical TCP repressor), the epistatic double mutant must also show increased tillers.

fixes.description: Flip T187 expected_direction from decreased to increased
fixes.reason: Duplicate encoding of T177 — same epistasis rule applies.
fixes.biological_justification: Same as T177 — osvil2 ostb1 follows ostb1-like increased tillering.

results.reason: Best-method accuracy 78.8% -> 80.0% (+1.2%); T177/T187 encoding fix — raw "similar to ostb1" = increased, not decreased. +2 tests on every method.
